title: Improve pmgen, Add "peepopt" pass with shift-mul pattern
body:
Add `peepopt` pass with a shift-mul pattern, addressing the same issue as #958.

Converts this

```
module mux_index_3_3 #(parameter N=3, parameter W=3) (input [N*W-1:0] i, input [$clog2(N)-1:0] s, output [W-1:0] o);
assign o = i[s*W+:W];
endmodule
```

into that

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/619764/56943469-e7e1bd80-6b1f-11e9-81f7-a6cc83effa89.png)

(with ``yosys -p 'synth -run coarse; show -width' test.v``)
